<?php /** * PHP Default Modular Exponentiation Engine * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger\Engines\PHP; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger\Engines\PHP\Reductions\EvalBarrett; /** * PHP Default Modular Exponentiation Engine * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class DefaultEngine extends EvalBarrett { }
